title: Saying Goodbye on the Last Day before a Job Change

all.en: My last day at the company arrived faster than I had expected.
all.zh: 我在公司的最後一天比我預期得還快到來。

all.en: I packed my desk slowly, looking at each item and remembering its story.
all.zh: 我慢慢整理桌面，看著每樣物品，回想它背後的故事。

all.en: My favorite mug, a gift from my first team leader, went into the box first.
all.zh: 我最喜歡的馬克杯，是我第一位組長送的禮物，第一個被放進紙箱。

all.en: Colleagues stopped by all morning to wish me good luck and share memories.
all.zh: 整個上午都有同事過來祝我好運，並分享彼此的回憶。

all.en: We laughed about the project that almost gave us all a nervous breakdown.
all.zh: 我們笑著聊起那個差點讓大家神經崩潰的專案。

all.en: My closest workmate gave me a handwritten card that made my eyes water.
all.zh: 和我最親近的同事送了我一張手寫卡片，看得我眼眶泛淚。

all.en: At noon, the team took me out for a long farewell lunch.
all.zh: 中午時，團隊帶我去吃了一頓漫長的歡送午餐。

all.en: They presented me with a photo album filled with silly pictures from the office.
all.zh: 他們送我一本相簿，裡面滿是辦公室裡的搞笑照片。

all.en: I thanked everyone for shaping me into the professional I had become.
all.zh: 我感謝大家把我塑造成今天這個專業人士的模樣。

all.en: When I handed in my badge, the security guard wished me well like an old friend.
all.zh: 當我交回識別證時，警衛像老朋友一樣祝福我。

all.en: Walking out the front door, I felt both sad and ready for the next chapter.
all.zh: 走出大門時，我心中既有不捨，也準備好迎接下一個篇章。

all.en: That evening, I sat on my balcony and reviewed everything I had learned in those five years.
all.zh: 那天晚上，我坐在陽台上，回顧這五年來所學到的一切。

all.en: My phone buzzed with messages from former teammates wishing me a smooth transition.
all.zh: 我的手機收到前同事們的訊息，紛紛祝我順利過渡到新工作。

all.en: I opened the photo album again and laughed at a silly picture from our last office party.
all.zh: 我再次翻開相簿，看到上次辦公室聚會的搞笑照片就笑了出來。

all.en: The next morning, I had coffee with my mentor who had retired the previous year.
all.zh: 隔天早上，我與去年退休的導師一起喝咖啡。

all.en: He reminded me to keep learning and to never stop being curious about my work.
all.zh: 他提醒我要持續學習，不要對工作失去好奇心。

all.en: On the weekend, I organized my notes and prepared mentally for the new challenge ahead.
all.zh: 週末時，我整理筆記，並為即將到來的新挑戰做好心理準備。

all.en: I bought a new notebook and a smart blazer to start the fresh chapter properly.
all.zh: 我買了一本新筆記本和一件時尚西裝外套，認真展開新篇章。

all.en: My family threw a small dinner to celebrate this important career milestone.
all.zh: 家人辦了一場小型晚餐會，慶祝我這個重要的職涯里程碑。

all.en: They reminded me that change can be uncomfortable but often leads to real growth.
all.zh: 他們提醒我，改變雖然令人不安，但往往會帶來真正的成長。

all.en: On Sunday night, I set my alarm early, ready to walk into a brand-new office.
all.zh: 星期日晚上，我把鬧鐘設得很早，準備好走進嶄新的辦公室。
